essence: Protects borders by enforcing immigration, customs, and security regulations at ports and crossings.

identity.title: Border Force Officer
identity.summary: Conducts checks on people and goods, detects illicit activity, and enforces border controls to protect national security.

salary.notes: Roles with specialist detection or intelligence responsibilities may attract higher pay.

qualifications: Relevant security or law enforcement training
Ability to work shifts and in high‑pressure situations

lifestyle.description: Shift work at ports, airports, and crossings with operational duties, public contact, and enforcement responsibilities.

habits: Works with partner agencies and law enforcement
